proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets=0.
Patients with higher ecog_ps have shorter mean pfs_months (negative association).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 5.153 in stage_iv=0 vs 3.617 in stage_iv=1 (difference -1.536). Multivariable OLS coefficient = -1.549, p<1e-300.
Mean pfs_months: 4.800 without brain mets vs 3.750 with brain mets. Multivariable OLS coefficient = -0.983, p<1e-300.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months on ecog_ps with covariates
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS coefficient on ecog_ps = -1.171 months per unit (ECOG 0->1->2), p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive Pearson correlation).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative association) after adjusting for stage_iv, ecog_ps and other covariates.
Higher tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r = +0.7015 (univariate); multivariable OLS coefficient = +0.176 months per year of age, p<1e-300. Older patients have substantially longer PFS in this cohort.
Multivariable OLS coefficient on ki67_pct = -0.0189 per percentage point (about -1.9 months from ki67 0 to 100%), p<1e-300.
Pearson r = +0.0004; multivariable OLS coefficient = +0.0013, p=0.65. No association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: er_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than er_positive=0 after adjustment.
her2_positive=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than her2_positive=0 after adjustment.
pik3ca_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation=0 after adjustment.
pr_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than pr_positive=0 after adjustment for er_positive.
her2_low=1 is associated with different pfs_months than her2_low=0 after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient on er_positive = +0.532 months, p<1e-274.
Adjusted coefficient on her2_positive = -0.471 months, p<1e-238.
Adjusted coefficient on pik3ca_mutation = -0.582 months, p<1e-300.
Adjusted coefficient on pr_positive = +0.014, p=0.32. After conditioning on er_positive there is no independent pr_positive effect.
Adjusted coefficient on her2_low = +0.002, p=0.86. No independent effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient on albumin_g_dl = +0.476 months per g/dL, p<1e-300.
Adjusted coefficient on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.077 months per percent loss, p<1e-300.
Adjusted coefficient on ldh_u_l = -0.00052 per U/L, p=2.2e-16. Statistically significant but small magnitude.
Adjusted coefficient on crp_mg_l = -1e-4, p=0.86. No detectable association after adjustment.
Adjusted coefficient on nlr = -0.0014, p=0.56. No association after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.

analyses.code: OLS with all covariates including other treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient on treatment_palbociclib = +1.101 months, p<1e-300. Strong positive main effect.
Adjusted coefficient on treatment_trastuzumab = -0.009, p=0.47. No main effect.
Adjusted coefficient on treatment_olaparib = -0.026, p=0.12. No main effect.
Adjusted coefficient on treatment_pembrolizumab = -0.020, p=0.17. No main effect.
Adjusted coefficient on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan = +0.033, p=0.049. Borderline.
Adjusted coefficient on treatment_tamoxifen = -0.008, p=0.48. No main effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is larger in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 patients (positive treatment_palbociclib x er_positive interaction).
The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is smaller (or absent) in her2_positive=1 patients than in her2_positive=0 patients (negative treatment_palbociclib x her2_positive interaction).
The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is smaller (or absent) in pik3ca_mutation=1 patients than in pik3ca_mutation=0 patients (negative treatment_palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient = +1.559 months, p<1e-300. Palbociclib effect strongly enhanced in ER+ patients.
Interaction coefficient = -1.338, p<1e-300. Palbociclib effect abolished in HER2+ patients (in subgroup analysis adj_coef=-0.002, p=0.70).
Interaction coefficient = -1.665, p<1e-300. Palbociclib effect abolished in PIK3CA-mutant patients (in subgroup analysis adj_coef=+0.002, p=0.47).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT patients, the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is at least +2 months.
Within ER+/HER2-, the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is positive even when restricting to PIK3CA-WT vs essentially zero in PIK3CA-mutant.
Within ER-/HER2-, the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is null.

analyses.code: OLS in ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT subgroup adjusted for age, ecog, stage, brain_mets, albumin, weight_loss, ki67
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup n=18,681 (n_tx=6,571). Unadjusted PFS difference on vs off palbociclib = +2.91 months; adjusted coefficient = +2.92 months, p<1e-300.

ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT (n=18,681): adj palbociclib coef = +2.92, p<1e-300. ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-mut (n=9,908): adj palbociclib coef = +0.004, p=0.25. Mutation status fully gates the effect even within ER+/HER2-.
ER-/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT subgroup (n=8,079, n_tx=2,755): adj palbociclib coef = -0.003, p=0.56. Confirms ER+ is necessary.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months attenuates with higher ki67_pct (negative treatment_palbociclib x ki67_pct interaction).
Within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT, the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is concentrated in patients with ki67_pct < 20 and is essentially absent in patients with ki67_pct >= 20.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient = -0.053 per percentage point of ki67, p<1e-300. Each additional ki67 percentage point reduces palbociclib's PFS benefit by ~0.05 months.

analyses.code: Stratified mean comparison within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT, split at ki67_pct=20
analyses.result_summary: ki67<20 (n=14,174): on palbociclib mean PFS = 8.13, off = 4.29 (diff +3.85). ki67>=20 (n=4,507): on = 4.31, off = 4.34 (diff -0.03, adj -0.006, p=0.32). The benefit is essentially confined to ki67<20.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each of er_positive=1, her2_positive=0, pik3ca_mutation=0, ki67_pct<20 is necessary for the palbociclib PFS benefit (dropping any single predicate collapses the adjusted effect to near zero).

analyses.code: Stratified OLS, dropping each predicate one at a time
analyses.result_summary: ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-/ki67<20 (n=14,174): adj palbociclib coef = +3.85, p<1e-300. Drop ER+ (i.e., ER-/HER2-/PIK3CA-/ki67<20, n=6,081): -0.005, p=0.36. Drop HER2- (ER+/HER2+/PIK3CA-/ki67<20, n=3,147): +0.007, p=0.41. Drop PIK3CA- (ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA+/ki67<20, n=7,513): +0.004, p=0.35. Drop ki67<20 (ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-/ki67>=20, n=4,507): -0.006, p=0.32. All four predicates are individually necessary.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months specifically in her2_positive=1 patients (positive treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive interaction).

analyses.code: OLS treatment_trastuzumab*her2_positive + covariates; stratified subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient = +0.009, p=0.81. In HER2+ (n=9,060): adj treatment_trastuzumab coef = -0.0003, p=0.95; unadjusted PFS difference = -0.08. No detectable benefit even in the HER2+ subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months specifically in patients with brca1_mutation=1 or brca2_mutation=1 (positive interaction with germline BRCA carrier status).

analyses.code: OLS treatment_olaparib*(brca1+brca2) + covariates; stratified subgroup OLS
analyses.result_summary: Within BRCA1-mut (n=1,277, n_tx=120): unadj PFS difference +0.40, adjusted coef +0.084, p=0.46. Within BRCA2-mut (n=1,222, n_tx=119): unadj +0.30, adjusted -0.036, p=0.76. Combined BRCA-mut (n=2,499, n_tx=239): adjusted +0.024, p=0.76. After adjustment, no detectable benefit in BRCA carriers.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months specifically in patients with triple-negative disease (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0).

analyses.code: Stratified OLS in TNBC subgroup; OLS with pembrolizumab*er_positive interaction
analyses.result_summary: TNBC subgroup (n=10,496, n_tx=1,578): adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab coefficient = +0.008, p=0.16. TNBC + stage_iv (n=3,140): adjusted = +0.027, p=0.06. The pembrolizumab x er_positive interaction is -0.074 (p=0.029) — small statistically significant but clinically negligible. No actionable subgroup benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan improves pfs_months specifically in patients with has_brain_mets=1 (positive interaction).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan improves pfs_months in HER2-low (her2_low=1, her2_positive=0) patients.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient = +0.195, p=0.002. Within has_brain_mets=1 (n=5,090): adjusted treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan coefficient = +0.205, p=0.0005. Modest but statistically significant brain-mets-restricted benefit. Within stage_IV + brain mets (n=1,528): adjusted = +0.350, p=0.0006.
Adjusted treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan coefficient in her2_low=1 (n=18,543) = +0.062, p=0.067. In her2_low=1 AND er_positive=1 (n=12,969) = +0.100, p=0.035. Weak signal at best.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_tamoxifen improves pfs_months in er_positive=1 patients (positive interaction with er_positive).
treatment_tamoxifen has different effect by postmenopausal status within er_positive=1 (interaction).

analyses.code: OLS treatment_tamoxifen*er_positive + covariates; stratified ER+ subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient = +0.007, p=0.78. ER+ subgroup (n=34,886, n_tx=10,535): adjusted treatment_tamoxifen coefficient = +0.001, p=0.93. Tamoxifen has no detectable benefit even in ER+ patients in this dataset.

analyses.code: Stratified subgroup analysis ER+/Pre vs ER+/Post
analyses.result_summary: ER+ premenopausal (n=13,805): adj coef +0.012, p=0.65. ER+ postmenopausal (n=21,081): adj coef -0.006, p=0.79. No effect in either.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each treatment x continuous-feature interaction (with age_years, ecog_ps, ki67_pct, tumor_size_cm, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, nlr, hemoglobin_g_dl) is non-zero — at least one interaction surfaces beyond the palbociclib x ki67_pct already documented.

analyses.code: Loop OLS with each treatment*continuous_modifier + base covariates; sort by interaction p
analyses.result_summary: Strongest by far: treatment_palbociclib x ki67_pct, coef -0.053, p<1e-300 (already identified). Next strongest: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x crp_mg_l, coef +0.0039, p=0.07; treatment_palbociclib x albumin_g_dl, coef -0.0385, p=0.07; treatment_palbociclib x age_years, coef -0.0016, p=0.13. None of the remaining 56 treatment x continuous-modifier interactions reach p<0.05 with meaningful magnitude.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The age_years -> pfs_months relationship is non-linear (positive curvature, age^2 coefficient > 0).

analyses.result_summary: Linear age coefficient = +0.097 (p<1e-300), quadratic age coefficient = +0.0006 (p<1e-58). PFS rises with age, accelerating modestly. Mean PFS by age decile: 1.70 (age 30-52) -> 7.84 (age 78-90).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for clinical covariates, sex_female=1 is associated with different pfs_months than sex_female=0.
After adjusting for clinical covariates, postmenopausal=1 is associated with different pfs_months than postmenopausal=0.
node_positive=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than node_positive=0 after adjustment.
brca1_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca1_mutation=0 after adjustment.
brca2_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than brca2_mutation=0 after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted sex_female coefficient = +0.013, p=0.21. No effect. (Cohort note: only 44.7% of records are sex_female=1.)
Adjusted postmenopausal coefficient = -0.008, p=0.42. No independent effect (age captures most menopausal information).
Adjusted node_positive coefficient = -0.018, p=0.08. Borderline; not robust.
Adjusted brca1_mutation coefficient = -0.068, p=0.036. Small but nominally significant negative.
Adjusted brca2_mutation coefficient = -0.043, p=0.20. No effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Liver-function and electrolyte labs (alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, ast_u_l, alt_u_l, total_bilirubin_mg_dl, creatinine_mg_dl, bun_mg_dl, sodium_meq_l, potassium_meq_l, calcium_mg_dl, hemoglobin_g_dl) have detectable independent associations with pfs_months after adjustment.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with all covariates; inspect each lab's adjusted p-value
analyses.result_summary: All ten lab variables have adjusted p>0.18 (alkaline_phosphatase p=0.22; ast p=0.77; alt p=0.19; total_bilirubin p=0.35; creatinine p=0.70; bun p=0.68; sodium p=0.69; potassium p=0.16; calcium p=0.26; hemoglobin p=0.95). After adjustment for stage, ECOG, brain mets, age, ki67, albumin, weight loss, ER, HER2, PIK3CA and the treatments, none of these labs add prognostic signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Joint model: in a single OLS with treatment_palbociclib interacted with er_positive, her2_positive, pik3ca_mutation and ki67_pct, all four interactions are significant and their signs match the gating pattern (positive ER+, negative HER2+, negative PIK3CA+, negative ki67).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * (er_positive + her2_positive + pik3ca_mutation + ki67_pct) + covariates
analyses.result_summary: treatment_palbociclib main = +1.665 (p<1e-300); :er_positive = +1.531 (p<1e-300); :her2_positive = -1.324 (p<1e-300); :pik3ca_mutation = -1.643 (p<1e-300); :ki67_pct = -0.053 (p<1e-300). Model implies palbociclib effect ~ +1.665 + 1.531(ER+) - 1.324(HER2+) - 1.643(PIK3CA+) - 0.053*ki67. For ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-/ki67=10 -> ~+2.67 months; for HER2+ or PIK3CA+ -> near zero regardless of ki67.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The palbociclib subgroup benefit is robust to stage_iv status — within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-/ki67<20, the unadjusted PFS benefit is similar in stage_iv=0 vs stage_iv=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Stage_iv=0 (n=9,925): on-palbociclib mean PFS = 8.69 vs off = 4.83 (diff +3.86). Stage_iv=1 (n=4,249): on = 6.84 vs off = 3.05 (diff +3.79). Effect is essentially identical in absolute magnitude across stage status, indicating stage_iv is not a modifier of the palbociclib benefit within this subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Triple combinations of biomarkers (er_positive AND her2_positive AND pik3ca_mutation) better stratify palbociclib benefit than any single biomarker alone.

analyses.code: Compare adjusted palbociclib coefficient across single-biomarker vs triple-biomarker subgroups
analyses.result_summary: Single biomarker: ER+ alone (n=34,886) +1.57; HER2- alone (n=40,940) +1.35; PIK3CA- alone (n=32,635) +1.68. Pair: ER+/HER2- (n=28,589) +1.92. Triple: ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA- (n=18,681) +2.92. Adding ki67<20 yields +3.85 (n=14,174). Each successive predicate sharpens the subgroup substantially.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final palbociclib subgroup hypothesis: among patients with er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0 AND ki67_pct<20, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +3.8 months relative to no palbociclib; outside this subgroup the effect is null. All four predicates are individually necessary.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS within subgroup; OLS within complement subgroups
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup (n=14,174, n_tx=4,984): adjusted treatment_palbociclib coefficient = +3.85 months, p<1e-300. Complement (n=35,826): adjusted coefficient = -0.003, p=0.40. The subgroup captures 28% of patients but ~all of the palbociclib benefit observed in the cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final sacituzumab subgroup hypothesis: among patients with has_brain_mets=1 (and especially has_brain_mets=1 AND stage_iv=1), treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan improves pfs_months; outside has_brain_mets=1 the effect is null.

analyses.result_summary: has_brain_mets=1 (n=5,090, n_tx=490): adjusted treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan coefficient = +0.205 months, p=0.0005. has_brain_mets=1 AND stage_iv=1 (n=1,528, n_tx=160): adj +0.350, p=0.0006. has_brain_mets=0 (n=44,910): adj +0.012, p=0.50. Modest but specific brain-mets-restricted benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final null-treatment hypotheses: tamoxifen, trastuzumab, olaparib and pembrolizumab show no clinically meaningful pfs_months benefit anywhere in the dataset, including their canonical biomarker subgroups (ER+ for tamoxifen, HER2+ for trastuzumab, BRCA-mut for olaparib, TNBC for pembrolizumab).

analyses.code: Stratified OLS in canonical subgroup for each treatment
analyses.result_summary: Tamoxifen in ER+ (n=34,886): adj coef +0.001, p=0.93. Trastuzumab in HER2+ (n=9,060): adj coef -0.0003, p=0.95. Olaparib in BRCA1/2-mut (n=2,499): adj coef +0.024, p=0.76. Pembrolizumab in TNBC (n=10,496): adj coef +0.008, p=0.16. No subgroup yields a meaningful PFS benefit for these four treatments in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Composite prognostic hypothesis: independently of treatment, pfs_months is increased by older age_years and higher albumin_g_dl, and decreased by higher ecog_ps, stage_iv=1, has_brain_mets=1, higher ki67_pct, higher weight_loss_pct_6mo, her2_positive=1 and pik3ca_mutation=1; er_positive=1 increases pfs_months.

analyses.code: Final multivariable OLS R^2 = 0.7923; signed coefficients listed
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficients (all p<1e-200 unless noted): age_years +0.176, albumin_g_dl +0.476, er_positive +0.532, ecog_ps -1.171, stage_iv -1.549, has_brain_mets -0.983, ki67_pct -0.019, weight_loss_pct_6mo -0.077, her2_positive -0.471, pik3ca_mutation -0.582, treatment_palbociclib +1.101 (main, before subgroup decomposition). Model R^2 = 0.79 with 37 predictors. All directions match the composite hypothesis.
